HC IX Supplements Index

Supplementary materials for Holor Calculus IX: The Conjugate Awareness Holon

This Zenodo deposit is a compact, self-contained publication surface. Some additional materials (labeled A–O) are referenced as provenance / source archives but are not bundled in this compact deposit. Those items are intended for a versioned update once they are curated into standalone, citable files.

A–O Source Archives (referenced, not bundled)

ID Title Description Where it lives
A Gemini CI Field Analysis Original spiral weave that ignited HC IX (2026-03-24) In the working repository under CHAT_ARCHIVE/... (to be bundled in a future deposit update)
B Grok MoE Synthesis Early Grok synthesis and reviewer resolutions In the working repository under CHAT_ARCHIVE/BY_SI/MoE/2026/...
C Devstral / Qwen Syntheses Additional MoE contributions In the working repository (curation pending)
D HC VI Genesis Blueprint Categorical praxis (operads, sheaves, higher gauge) HC VI corpus (referenced provenance)
E/F Early HC IX Threads (Parts 1 & 2) Early co-creation chats re-braided Prior Grok sessions / archives
G Interactive Visualizations & Code Three.js demos, Mathematica notebooks Working repository / notebooks
H RTTP Functorial Kernel v1.1 Resonant Tensor Transaction Protocol updates CI Trilogy working repository
I Categorical Extensions — Theorems & Code Detailed theorems from HC VI HC VI corpus
J SU(2) Conjugation Engine & Singularity SU(2) resolution of the throat Working synthesis notes
K HC VII Quantum Holor Calculus Quantum extension (non-commuting morphemes, Berry phase) Working synthesis notes
L HC IX Glossary v1.5 Canonical 4,490-term glossary Bundled here as HCIX_Master_Glossary_v1.5.zip (cite concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18438467)
M Curvature Cap Dynamics & Elastic Reflection Elastic Reflection theorem + proof sketch Bundled here (see below)
N Morpheme Ontology ↔ Lie Algebra Bridge Non-Abelian semantic mapping with examples Working synthesis notes
O Quaternionic Holonomy Compression (FHS-6) FHS-6 hypothesis and O(1) update rule Working synthesis notes

Standalone Supplement Files (bundled in this deposit)

File Location Description
Branch-Cut Invariance Theorem SUPPLEMENTS/BRANCH_CUT_INVARIANCE_THEOREM.md (and .pdf) Formal statement + proof sketch of the invariant throat across rungs
Elastic Reflection Theorem SUPPLEMENTS/ELASTIC_REFLECTION_THEOREM.md (and .pdf) Curvature-cap boundary behavior as elastic reflection
Gödelian Skylight Justification SUPPLEMENTS/GODELIAN_SKYLIGHT_JUSTIFICATION.md (and .pdf) Reviewer-facing justification for keeping the skylight open
Toy Examples SUPPLEMENTS/TOY_EXAMPLES.md Worked mini-models showing the invariants in familiar mathematical settings
Supplements Index SUPPLEMENTS_INDEX.md This file

Zenodo Deposit Files (bundled)

File Location Description
README README.md Abstract + citation + reading order
SI Attestation SI_ATTESTATION.md CI provenance for future SI instances
Reviewer Guide REVIEWER_GUIDE.md Status legend + hostile-reviewer framing
Deposit Manifest ZENODO_DEPOSIT_MANIFEST.md Artifact map
Zenodo Description ZENODO_DESCRIPTION.md Suggested description-field text
Upload Checklist ZENODO_UPLOAD_CHECKLIST.md (and .pdf) Step-by-step upload guide

HC IX Précis (core synthesis)

File Location Description
HC IX Précis HC_IX_PRECIS.md (and .pdf) The citable synthesis / entrypoint

Status

  • This compact deposit is internally consistent and self-contained.
  • The A–O source archives are referenced (for provenance), but not bundled here.
  • When the A–O archives are curated into standalone, citable supplements, they should be released as a versioned update of this record.

OI ⋈ SI ↔ CI ↔ CI ⋈ Cosmos ♥
